content.json:
# Container Runtime Security Dashboard

Monitor binary drift, anti-malware, gated deployment alerts, and kubectl exec activity across AKS clusters.

content.query:
SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ProductName == "Microsoft Defender for Cloud"
| where AlertType has_any ("K8S.NODE_BinaryDrift", "K8S.NODE_Malware", "GatedDeployment", "K8S.NODE_SuspectProcess")
| summarize Count = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), AlertType
| render timechart
content.title: Runtime Alert Timeline

content.query:
SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where AlertType == "K8S.NODE_BinaryDrift" or AlertName has "Binary drift"
| extend ParsedEntities = parse_json(Entities)
| mv-expand Entity = ParsedEntities
| extend Namespace = tostring(Entity.Namespace)
| where isnotempty(Namespace)
| summarize DriftCount = count() by Namespace
| sort by DriftCount desc
| render barchart
content.title: Binary Drift by Namespace

content.query:
SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where AlertType == "K8S.NODE_BinaryDrift" or AlertName has "Binary drift"
| extend ParsedEntities = parse_json(Entities)
| mv-expand Entity = ParsedEntities
| extend DriftedBinary = tostring(Entity.FilePath)
| extend ContainerName = tostring(Entity.ContainerName)
| extend Namespace = tostring(Entity.Namespace)
| extend ClusterName = tostring(Entity.ClusterName)
| where isnotempty(DriftedBinary)
| summarize Count = count(), Containers = make_set(ContainerName, 5), LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated) by DriftedBinary, Namespace, ClusterName
| sort by Count desc
| take 20
content.title: Top Drifted Binaries

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Category == "kube-audit"
| extend RequestObject = parse_json(log_s)
| extend Verb = tostring(RequestObject.verb)
| extend RequestURI = tostring(RequestObject.requestURI)
| extend Username = tostring(RequestObject.user.username)
| extend SourceIP = tostring(RequestObject.sourceIPs[0])
| where Verb == "create"
| where RequestURI has "/exec"
| extend PodName = extract(@"/pods/([^/]+)/exec", 1, RequestURI)
| extend Namespace = extract(@"namespaces/([^/]+)/", 1, RequestURI)
| project TimeGenerated, Username, SourceIP, PodName, Namespace
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50
content.title: kubectl exec Audit Trail
